label: Cancer Resistance
description: Genes convergently evolved in species with extremely low cancer rates

label: Longevity / Aging
description: Genes associated with extended lifespan in long-lived species

label: Viral Immunity / Tolerance
description: Genes evolved in bat species that host high viral loads without disease — innate immune tolerance and interferon regulation

label: Hypoxia Tolerance
description: Genes evolved in species that tolerate extreme low-oxygen environments

label: DNA Repair / Genome Stability
description: Genes involved in convergent improvements to DNA damage detection and repair
